2604.15593.title: DALM: A Domain-Algebraic Language Model via Three-Phase Structured Generation
2604.15593.paper_summary: Large language models compress heterogeneous knowledge into a single parameter space, allowing facts from different domains to interfere during generation. We propose DALM, a Domain-Algebraic Language Model that replaces unconstrained token generation with structured denoising over a domain lattice. DALM follows a three-phase generation path: it first resolves domain uncertainty, then relation uncertainty, and finally concept uncertainty, so each stage operates under explicit algebraic constraints. The framework requires only three ingredients: a lattice of domains with computable meet, join, and implication; a typing function over relations that controls inheritance across domains; and a fiber partition that localizes knowledge to domain-specific subsets. Given these ingredients, DALM yields a three-phase encoder-decoder architecture in which generation is confined to a domain fiber, cross-domain contamination is structurally prevented in closed-vocabulary mode and auditably bounded in open-vocabulary mode, and a single query can produce a domain-indexed multi-perspective answer space. We instantiate the framework with the CDC knowledge representation system and outline training and evaluation on validated domain-annotated crystal libraries. DALM reframes language generation as algebraically constrained structured denoising rather than unconstrained decoding over a flat token space.
2604.15593.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型將異質知識壓縮到單一的參數空間中，允許來自不同領域的事實在生成過程中相互干擾。<lb/>我們提出了DALM，一種域代數語言模型，通過在域格上進行結構化去噪來取代不受限制的標記生成。<lb/>DALM遵循三階段生成路徑：首先解決領域不確定性，然後是關係不確定性，最後是概念不確定性，因此每個階段都在明確的代數約束下運作。<lb/>該框架僅需要三個要素：一個具有可計算的交、並和蘊涵的領域格；一個控制跨領域繼承的關係類型函數；以及一個將知識本地化到領域特定子集的纖維劃分。<lb/>基於這些要素，DALM產生了一個三階段的編碼器-解碼器架構，其中生成被限制在一個領域纖維中，跨領域污染在封閉詞彙模式下結構性地被防止，在開放詞彙模式下可審計地受到限制，並且單個查詢可以產生一個領域索引的多視角答案空間。<lb/>我們用CDC知識表示系統實現了該框架，並概述了在經過驗證的領域註釋晶體庫上的訓練和評估。<lb/>DALM將語言生成重新框架為代數約束的結構化去噪，而不是在平坦標記空間上不受限制的解碼。
2604.15593.author: Chao Li et.al.
